description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house surrounded by a fenced yard with manicured landscaping. The house features a complex, multi-gabled roof with gray shingles and beige exterior walls, accented by white trim. The front facade includes a double garage, a covered entryway with columns, and a pathway leading through a neatly maintained lawn and flower beds. The rear of the house has expansive windows and a large open lawn, while the sides are bordered by shrubs and trees. The property is enclosed by a dark fence, providing privacy and a clear boundary. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, with a focus on comfort and curb appeal.
description: A spacious two-story beige house with a multi-gabled gray roof, double garage, and landscaped fenced yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entryway with columns, pathway, and detailed landscaping.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the garage side, side windows, and a mix of shrubs and lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large windows, a broad open lawn, and the full extent of the fenced backyard.
description_view_3: Right side view with additional windows, side entry path, and a mix of greenery along the fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rear windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entry with columns, steps, and a central front door flanked by decorative landscaping
